name: Struts: Form Bean Does Not Extend Validation Class
description: A Struts form bean does not extend a Validator framework class (ValidatorForm or DynaValidatorForm), so the framework's built-in input validation is never invoked and form data passes through unvalidated.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL[form_bean] node extends ActionForm instead of ValidatorForm, causing CONTROL[struts_validator] to never activate so INGRESS[form_data] flows to TRANSFORM or STORAGE without framework validation
graph_query: INGRESS[form_data]→TRANSFORM|STORAGE without CONTROL[struts_validator] due to wrong parent class
